quotes: Fluid wave forms in two colorways: Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue; each in long and short variants.
Construction: top wave layer at 70% transparency over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.

rules.intent: Maintain the distinct visual appearance of the layered brand waves.
rules.rule_text: Fluid wave forms must only use approved colorways and layers: top wave layer at 70% transparency (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) over the base wave layer (Gold over Sunshine, or Sky Blue over Deep Blue), preserving the translucent quality.

quotes: Masthead gradient with logo mark (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Standardize the branding block structure and background treatment for the email header.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient with the logo mark placed at the lightest end (Sunshine -> 0C,10M,78Y,0K) is the only approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
